name: colosseum
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN38 colosseum. The TAO Colosseum source repository is live, while the previously discovered taocolosseum.com website currently redirects to an Afternic parked-domain sale page and is intentionally not promoted as a curated website/docs surface.

gap_notes: TAO Colosseum source repository is live and promoted.
Previously discovered taocolosseum.com website currently redirects to an Afternic parked-domain sale page.
No verified official docs site yet beyond public directory/community pages.
No verified machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger schema yet.
No verified safe public subnet API endpoint yet.
No verified standalone static data artifact yet.

surfaces.name: TAO Colosseum source repository
